channel.title: Weather on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Weather on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Weather Station Software 2026: WeeWX, Meteobridge, and More
item.description: Running your own weather station gives you complete ownership of environmental data — no cloud subscriptions, no API limits, and no data selling to third parties. Whether you’re a weather enthusiast, a farmer monitoring microclimates, or a homeowner tracking local conditions, self-hosted weather station software turns raw sensor readings into beautiful dashboards, historical reports, and real-time alerts.
